title: An Act to Require an Individual to Present Photographic Identification for the Purpose of Voting
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 14, 2025
last_house_action: 3/20/2025 - Transmitted to the Clerk of the 132nd Maine Legislature by the Secretary of State on March 19, 2025 and ordered printed. On motion of Representative Supica of Bangor, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/14/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Transmitted to the Clerk of the 132nd Maine Legislature by the Secretary of State on March 19, 2025 and ordered printed. On motion of Representative Supica of Bangor, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator HICKMAN of Kennebec REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS in concurrence
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
